texto: I was starting to feel like my opposition was futile. Was my resistance worth the weariness that was seeping into my body? I couldn’t deny that I coveted him. I recognized my body’s demand for him for what it was and I had no disillusionments
autor: I knew that I would enjoy the promises he tantalized me with.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a I knew that I would enjoy the promises he tantalized me with.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a autoestima.
